text.title: Quality Attributes Framework Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: NFR row reads 'system shall be fast and secure'.
antipattern.fix: Reject; require 6-field scenario with numeric Measure.

antipattern.symptom: Spec omits Maintainability and Compliance categories.
antipattern.root-cause: r2 violated; only the loudest categories captured.
antipattern.fix: Use ISO-25010 checklist; require explicit out-of-scope note for any omitted category.
Force utility tree with importance × difficulty quadrants; require distribution across quadrants.

antipattern.symptom: Scenarios exist as doc text; no SLI / SLO live in monitoring.
antipattern.fix: Block sign-off until each high-priority scenario maps to an SLI dashboard panel.
